case_title: MITCHELL EDWARD S VS BARNES KENT KELLER

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES KENT KELLER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY MITCHELL EDWARD S AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES KENT KELLER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MITCHELL EDWARD S IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARNES KENT KELLER PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF ON LIABILITY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
